calendar.matters:
Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Continued To Jun-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Re: Minor
Off Calendar Mar-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Mark W. Hostetter, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Martine Dalmas, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Seth Dalmas.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $100,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $30,000.00 payable to Mark w. Hostetter.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the amount of $2,200.00
Midical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follow, in the amount of $3,450.00 to (i) SFGH Medical Group P. O. Boc 7464, San Francisco, CA 94120. $3,200.00. (ii) City and County of San Francisco, Bureau of Delinquent Revenue 1 Dr. Carlton B. Goodlett Place, Room 140. San Francisco, CA 94102. $250.00
$10,000 to Ingenix Subrogation Services, 75 Remittance Drive, Suite 6019, Chicago, KL 60675-6019 for insurance payments by United Health Care.
$7,910.00 to Healthcare Recoveries, c/o Ken Zuber, Gibson & Sharps, 9420 Bunsen Parkway, Louisville, KY 40220 for Insurance benefits by Kaiser Permanente.
$3,882.00 to Mark W. Hostetter for Litigation Costs Advanced.
A net balance of $42,558.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Oak Valley Community Bank, 20 Plaza Circle Patterson, CA 95363 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on June 20, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
